vocab.meaning: bị sa lầy, bị ngập trong (quá nhiều việc/chi tiết)
vocab.example: I often find myself getting bogged down with tedious administrative tasks instead of focusing on actual research.

vocab.meaning: vật lộn với, gặp khó khăn với
vocab.example: To be honest, I really struggle with the sheer volume of technical jargon we are expected to memorize.

vocab.meaning: tụt lại phía sau, không theo kịp tiến độ
vocab.example: If I miss just one lecture, it's incredibly easy to fall behind with the coursework due to its fast pace.
Sometimes I worry that my academic performance doesn't quite measure up to the high expectations of my professors.
The constant pressure of back-to-back exams really wears me out by the end of the semester.

vocab.meaning: coi thường, xem nhẹ (một môn học/phương pháp)
vocab.example: I dislike how some academic circles look down on practical experience in favor of purely theoretical knowledge.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó nản lòng/mất hứng thú
vocab.example: The monotonous way some subjects are taught really puts me off and kills my natural curiosity.

vocab.meaning: vật lộn để đọc xong/làm xong (thứ gì đó dài và khó)
vocab.example: It is quite a chore to plow through hundreds of pages of dense academic literature every single week.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp, bắt kịp (kiến thức/khối lượng bài tập)
vocab.example: One aspect I loathe is the struggle to keep up with the ever-changing trends and updates in my field of study.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua, hoàn thành (một giai đoạn khó khăn)
vocab.example: I sometimes find it hard to get through the final month of the year without feeling completely burnt out.
